expected_post_export_gates: boot-critical files readable and selectively extractable
semantic authority preserves FL16 BLOCKED_NOT_PROMOTED and FL17 EXPORT_PACKAGE_PASS_ONLY
fix: Embed a final internal proof report that declares external_sidecar_required for final ZIP identity, plus receipt/handoff/tracker state bound to 5R2. The external sidecar and external validation report provide the final ZIP SHA-256.
root_cause: FL17-MERGE-5 timed out because heavyweight validation commands were used. FL17-MERGE-5R repaired recovery proof, but its internal ZIP member contained pre-export proof while final pass proof was external, creating a future-boot ambiguity. 5R2 repairs that by making the internal proof explicitly sidecar-bound rather than pretending to embed the final ZIP hash.
